title: cenchrus pauciflorus var. longispinus
intro: Cenchrus pauciflorus var. longispinus, also known as the long-spine sandbur or grassbur, is a variety of the Cenchrus pauciflorus plant, which is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various medicinal applications due to its unique properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been observed to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The long-spine sandbur is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
